name: Farmers' Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Combine all ingredients, except flour and dough, in a large roasting pan or casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle flour over vegetable mixture, cover, and place in oven.
4. After 30 minutes, reduce temperature to 275°F.
5. Stir and replace the cover. Cook for one hour, mixing occasionally.
6. Remove the cover and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Remove stew from the oven and set aside while rolling dough.
8. Roll out dough 1/4-inch thick. Arrange dough on top of stew, trimming off excess and cutting steam vents.
9. Raise oven temperature to 350°F and bake stew until it sounds hollow when tapped and is golden brown, about 30 minutes.
10. Serve immediately.
Note: The stew can be made ahead and refrigerated for up to 3 days or frozen for up to one week. When ready to use, top the refrigerated or thawed stew with dough and bake as directed.
